retry_reason: Failure can be due to ENOMEM (allocation) or ENODEV (missing hardware); retrying ENOMEM may succeed but is not refcount-related, and ENODEV is permanent.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is initializing a global cache of AMD northbridge data, including allocation, node iteration, and setting flags. The refcount increments via amd_node_get_func are incidental side effects of populating the cache, not the main objective.
judge.retry_reason: Failure can be due to ENOMEM (allocation) or ENODEV (missing hardware); retrying ENOMEM may succeed but is not refcount-related, and ENODEV is permanent.
